title: Gelanty Fineliner Pens, 60-Colors Fine Point Color Pens Set 0.4mm Fine Tip Colored Pens Drawing Pen for Journaling, Writing Note, Comics, Coloring Books
features: [ Colouring Pens Pack ] 0.4mm colored fine tip pens set come with 60 colors assorted colors combine rich, vivid, warm and cold hues. Let your imagination run free with this wide spectrum of colours, bring unlimited creative possibilities

[ Premium Quality ] Each fineliner pen cap colors is match to the ink color for easy to Identify, fine point pens stable writing, not easy to break. High-quality pigment ink, non-toxic, acid-free and odorless, the ink flows smoothly, quickly drying, no stain, bleed or leak, bring a good writing experience for user

[ Wide Application ] Fineliner colourful pens set are suitable for drawing lines & details, journal, note taking, painting, writting, coloring, sketch, marker, signing, manga, animation, graphic, design and illustration etc. Very suitable for teachers, students, office staffs and artists

[Smooth Writing ] Fineliner drawing pens with superfine, metal-clad tipped, writing lines are smooth, no tearing up the paper, outstanding performance in all areas of drawing, coloring, writing. do not hesitate to have yourself color pens now

[ Great Gift ] Safe and environmental friendly fine tip pens suitable for kids and adults expressing their creative inspiration. It is a great gift for your children, students, family, classmate or friends who love drawing
